description: Style Note 109f stands out from the rest because of the range of colours, patterns and different styles it brings to the fashion conscious dresser. From tops to dresses to tunics, all their creations are stylish with excellent use of feminine touches. We at myntra love updating our wardrobes with 109F clothing! Product Details Black and cream printed sleeveless dress, has a cross over neckline, gathers at the apex of the cross over and a sash through loops around the waist Material and Care Synthetic Hand wash cold Do not iron on decorations Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 90 cm from the shoulders to the hem
